hadith_entries.text:
309. Narrated by Abu-Huraira: 'The Prophet said:
"Allah will give shade to seven people on the Day when there
will be no shade but His. (These seven persons are) A just
ruler, a youth who has been brought up in the worship of
Allah (i.e. worships Allah alone sincerely from his
childhood), a man whose heart is attached to the mosque (i.e.
who offers the five compulsory congregational prayers (in the
mosque), two persons who love each other only for Allah's
sake and they meet and part in Allah's cause only, a man who
refuses the seduction of a charming woman of noble birth and
says: "I am afraid of Allah," a man who gives charitable gifts.
so secretly that his left hand does not know what his right
hand has given, and a person who remembers Allah in
seclusion and his eyes become flooded with tears."""
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
